title: Python Programming Fundamentals
description: Master the basics of Python programming with hands-on projects and real-world examples.
learning_objectives: Understand Python syntax and data types
Work with lists, dictionaries, and file operations
overview: This comprehensive course teaches you Python from scratch. You'll start with basic syntax and gradually progress to building practical applications. By the end, you'll have the skills to solve real-world problems with Python.

modules.title: Python Basics and Setup
modules.description: Introduction to Python, installation, and development environment setup.

modules.title: Core Concepts and Data Structures
modules.description: Learn variables, data types, operators, and Python data structures.

modules.title: Functions and File Handling
modules.description: Master function definition, scope, and working with files.

lesson_sequence.title: What is Python and Why Learn It?
Installing Python and Setting Up Your Environment

learning_roadmap: Week 1: Python Basics → Week 2: Data Structures → Week 3: Control Flow & Functions → Week 4: Projects & Best Practices
